questionHtml: By considering the gradient of the curve, suggest a reason why Euler’s method does not give a good approximation for the y-coordinate at x=5π12.
markschemeHtml:
the gradient changes substantially (in the neighbourhood of x=5π12)          R1

 

Note: Award R0 for saying the gradient is very large at x=5π12

[1 mark]

meta.title: By considering the gradient of the curve, suggest a reason why Euler’s method does not give a good approximation for the y-coordinate at x=5π12.
